title: tritoma × hybrida
intro: Tritoma × hybrida, also known as the firecracker plant, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is known for its vibrant red, tubular flowers that resemble a firecracker, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The firecracker plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Tritoma × hybrida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits.
